mapper.insert: insert into report_result (special_report_id, report_name, monitor_keywords, report_type, brief_summary, monitor_summary, opinion_trend, source_media_analysis, emotion_analysis, region_distribution, hot_analysis_words, hot_information, disposal_opinions, create_time, update_time) values (#{specialReportId}, #{reportName}, #{monitorKeywords}, #{reportType}, #{briefSummary}, #{monitorSummary}, #{opinionTrend}, #{sourceMediaAnalysis}, #{emotionAnalysis}, #{regionDistribution}, #{hotAnalysisWords}, #{hotInformation}, #{disposalOpinions}, now(), now())
mapper.select: select * from report_result where special_report_id = #{specialReportId} order by create_time desc
